arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Villarreal, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid predicted XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe. Rodrygo and Mbappe will likely return to the starting lineup, while Tchouameni could be deployed as a center-back in order to give Militao the chance to rest.

arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Villarreal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are aiming to close the gap on Clasico rivals Barcelona on Saturday when they face Villarreal in La Liga. Los Blancos had made an unbeaten start to the new season until a surprise defeat to French outfit Lille in the Champions League midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid slayer emerges as leading striker candidate for Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona are expected to look for a new striker from 2025 onwards. Robert Lewandowski is coming towards the end of his career, and considering that he is 36, he can no longer be relied upon to be the club’s undisputed starting striker over the course of a season. However, he’s likely to stay that way […] The post Real Madrid slayer emerges as leading striker candidate for Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confident of Gavi making return in time for El Clasico
arts.sum: It has been almost 11 months since Gavi suffered a serious knee injury whilst playing for Spain. The 20-year-old ruptured his anterior cruciate ligament and damaged his meniscus during that incident last November, and since then, he has been working his way back to full fitness. Gavi is very much in the final stages of […] The post Barcelona confident of Gavi making return in time for El Clasico appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face Real Madrid battle for HUGE target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are "closely monitoring" Aston Villa's Jhon Duran, according to reports. Duran helped Villa clinch a 1-0 win over Bayern Munich on Wednesday, with his 79th-minute goal being the difference.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Villarreal today: will Mbappé, Rodrygo start?
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé is poised to return to the Real Madrid line-up against Villarreal this weekend, having staged a rapid recovery from injury . Ancelotti must decide whether to keep Militão in his line-up, or draft in midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni as a makeshift central-defensive partner for Antonio Rüdiger.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Madrid vs. Villarreal
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Villarreal.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: How Quickly Can Real Madrid Bounce Back?
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Matt Wiltse discuss: Kiyan and Matt discuss big picture Real Madrid: How can Ancelotti turn this around?
